summary: REQ-1 appears implemented in FeedPage (no FeedHeroBanner import/render shown). REQ-2 and REQ-3 cannot be confirmed from the provided diffs: there’s no direct evidence the slogan string was removed everywhere, nor that the specific banner asset reference was removed from the hero/banner UI. Several unrelated UI/Feed behavior changes and branding/logo updates appear introduced beyond the requested banner/slogan reversion.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove the slogan update by deleting the recently added slogan text "Giving everyone a voice!" from the UI where it was introduced as part of the recent banner/slogan change set.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary does not show removal of the exact slogan string, and the modified FeedHeroBanner.tsx contents are not included to verify the slogan was removed from the hero area or elsewhere.
evidence: frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx (shown; does not contain slogan, but does not prove it was removed from other components)

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove any now-unused static banner asset references introduced by the recent banner change (including `/assets/generated/feed-hero-banner.dim_2400x600.png`) and ensure the app builds without unused/unused-import errors.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary does not show removal of references to `/assets/generated/feed-hero-banner.dim_2400x600.png`. FeedHeroBanner.tsx was modified, but its contents are not shown, so the referenced asset removal cannot be verified.

hallucinated_features.description: Significant Feed page behavior changes (draft subscription via localStorage changes, language-specific empty state detection, backend item mapping/author metadata changes) unrelated to reverting banner/slogan.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly states this is a UI reversion only and non-goals include not redesigning unrelated Feed behavior; these changes go beyond removing the banner/slogan.

hallucinated_features.description: BrandingBanner redesigned to show a centered logo with error fallback and a top-left dropdown menu, including use of a new generated logo asset path.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest non-goal: do not introduce new branding content; these branding/logo changes are not requested as part of reverting the most recent banner/slogan changes.
